data.name: Life Matters - Season 1
data.detailed_description:
Updated Last of December 30th, 2023
This game is about you living another life. You'll meet many people with your best friend Jordan and a girl named Delilah. You work a dead-end job with many misadventures with other people and storylines that may end one way or another, depending on your choices.

Game is ~35% Completion Done.

Life matter is an Adult Visual Novel with several endings to the game choice leading to getting women or getting friend-zoned. There will be many choices in the game. Some may have an immediate effect, and some may not affect much, but everything matters in the end.

What will you do with your story? Will it be a drama filled event with many women or a time with your best friends and many more life paths to take.

The game expected playtime will be around 8 hours with current update it depends on what choices you make, but it is around 2 hours 50 minutes of gameplay depending on your choices and the path you take it could be more or less.

The game is designed to be played multiple times to get different paths, dialogue, different outcomes to character interactions and see how your choices have consequences (Some choices will effect later on in the game.)(As the game is developed the more consequences will happen to you and the story will branch from your choices.)(If your gameplay is short than try different paths.)

The Final Game will have a Prologue and 3 Chapters Each Chapter will be around 2 hours long.

The Current Game Update has: The Prologue & Episode 1 Part 1

data.short_description: Life Matters is an Adult Visual Novel where choices that actually impact your story. The game is designed to be played multiple times to see how your choices take you on different paths, characters, and how you change people lives as the story goes.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 or higher
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 3 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
